name: MTN Foundation Scholarship
description: The MTN Foundation Science & Technology Scholarship is open to undergraduate students studying STEM or Social Sciences in accredited Nigerian universities. Award covers tuition and provides a monthly stipend. Candidates must have a minimum CGPA of 3.5 on a 5.0 scale and be in 200 or 300 level.

name: Federal Government Scholarship (Bilateral Education Agreement)
description: The BEA Scholarship funds Nigerian students to study abroad in countries with bilateral agreements including Russia, China, Hungary, Cuba and others. Open to fresh O'Level holders and undergraduates in public tertiary institutions.

name: NNPC/SNEPCo National Merit Scholarship
description: Open to 100-level students in federal universities studying Engineering, Geosciences, Law, Accounting or Computer Science. Requires minimum JAMB score of 200 and First Class or Second Class Upper O'Level grades.

name: Commonwealth Scholarship (Masters & PhD)
description: The Commonwealth Scholarship funds postgraduate study at UK universities. Open to Nigerian graduates with a First Class or strong Second Class Upper degree who have a clear development impact plan. Covers tuition, flight, living allowance and more.

name: Dangote Foundation Scholarship
description: Annual scholarship for undergraduate students in Nigerian public universities. Open to students studying Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics, Agriculture and related fields with minimum CGPA of 3.0.
